scope: Repair run: restore real keyboard/mouse input for the v0.1 build.
summary: Operator-reported total input deadness traced to project.godot [input] events serialized as JSON-style dictionaries, which Godot 4 parses as plain data and binds to nothing (InputMap.action_get_events returned 0 events for every action). Rewrote all bindings with Object(InputEventKey/InputEventMouseButton) serialization using physical keycodes; added smoke check input_actions_bound because programmatic Input.action_press() bypasses the InputMap and had masked the defect. Post-fix smoke: 23/23 pass.
acceptance: Pre-fix diagnostic confirmed root cause: 0 bound events for move_left/jump/mine/interact/save_game
Post-fix: all 15 gameplay actions have at least one real InputEventKey/InputEventMouseButton
Full smoke suite 23/23 PASS, exit 0 (Godot 4.6.1 headless)
validation: COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 headless run -> SMOKE RESULT: PASS (23/23), including input_actions_bound
decisions: Used physical_keycode (layout-independent) for all key bindings
Kept verification gap closed in-suite: smoke test now asserts device bindings exist rather than only driving actions programmatically
risks: Human playthrough still pending for feel/tuning; input path now verified to the InputMap level
next_action: Operator relaunch and playthrough; report any remaining dead inputs.
